message:
fix(confidence): correct delta calculation when confidence is clamped

Previously delta was calculated before clamping to max/min bounds, resulting
in inconsistent values (e.g., delta could be non-zero when newConfidence
didn't change). Now delta reflects the actual change after clamping.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
